generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always believed in being prepared. But have you noticed how the government keeps pushing for more civil defense spending while cutting essential services? It's like they want us to live in fear. We need balanced security that doesn't sacrifice our communities' well-being. #SmartSafety #CommunityFirst
